User.title: User
User.description: Schema for user profiles stored on Firebase Authentication sign-in

email.description: Email address of the authenticated user

name.description: Full display name of the user

role.description: System role (Executive Founder, Consortium Partner Node)

avatarLetter.description: A single uppercase letter representing the profile avatar

ChatSession.title: ChatSession
ChatSession.description: Workspace session containers containing message subcollections

id.description: A unique identifier for the session

category.description: Session category alignment (General, Ozone, Tectonic, Drones)

ownerId.description: The UID of the user who owns this session

ChatMessage.title: ChatMessage
ChatMessage.description: Individual messages loaded sequentially within a given session

id.description: Unique identifier of the message document

users/{userId}.description: Collection of localized profiles representing system personnel

sessions/{sessionId}.description: Corporate workspace sessions owned securely by personnel

sessions/{sessionId}/messages/{messageId.description: Chronological speech items stored as unbounded subcollections
